nodes.label: favicon.svg
nodes.description: SVG favicon for the licitaciones application; 64x64 rounded square icon with dark teal (#0c594d) background and a white stylized document/paper shape with text lines, representing a tender document or form.

nodes.label: Document Motif
nodes.description: White SVG path shape depicting a document or paper with a tab/fold and horizontal text lines, rendered inside the favicon.

nodes.label: Teal Brand Color
nodes.description: Dark teal fill color #0c594d used for the favicon's rounded-rectangle background; a color commonly associated with government and institutional interfaces in Spanish-speaking public-sector software.

edges.description: The SVG path elements (d='M18 17h8v24h20v7H18V17Zm13 0h8v19h-8V17Z') explicitly draw a white document/paper shape with a tab and text lines.
The SVG rect element explicitly specifies fill='#0c594d' for the 64x64 rounded background.
The white (#fff) document motif is rendered on top of the dark teal (#0c594d) background, creating a high-contrast icon design.
